info.title: DefaultDocumentation.Console
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Paillat Laszlo
-h, --LogLevel                    Minimum level of the logs to display
-j, --ConfigurationFilePath       Path to the json configuration file to use
-a, --AssemblyFilePath            Path to the assembly file
-d, --DocumentationFilePath       Path to the xml documentation file, if not
specified DefaultDocumentation will assume
it is in the same folder as the assembly
-p, --ProjectDirectoryPath        Path to the project source folder
-o, --OutputDirectoryPath         Path to the output folder, if not specified
the documentation will be generated in the
same folder as the xml documentation file
-n, --AssemblyPageName            Name of the assembly documentaton file
-s, --GeneratedAccessModifiers    State elements with which access modifier
should be generated
-u, --IncludeUndocumentedItems    If true items with no documentation will
also be included
-g, --GeneratedPages              State which elements should have their own
page
-l, --LinksOutputFilePath         File path where the documentation will
generate its links
-b, --LinksBaseUrl                Base url of the documentation for the
generated links file
-e, --ExternLinksFilePaths        Links files to use for external
documentation
--Plugins                         plugin files to use to create the
documentation
--DocItemGenerators               Name or [Type Assembly] of the
IDocItemGenerator to use
--UrlFactories                    Name or [Type Assembly] of the IUrlFactory
to use to create documentation url
--Elements                        [Type Assembly] of the explicit element
implementations to use to create the
documentation
--FileNameFactory                 Name or [Type Assembly] of the
IFileNameFactory to use to create
documentation files
--Sections                        Name or [Type Assembly] of the
ISectionWriter to use to create the
documentation
--help                            Display this help screen.
--version                         Display version information.
